title: AZ-900 Mock Exam 3: Architecture, Security, and Governance
description: A 50-question unofficial mock paper aligned to the AZ-900 skills measured from July 20, 2026. Covers cloud concepts, Azure architecture and services, and management and governance. Includes detailed explanations and official Microsoft Learn references. Original practice content; not official exam questions.

items.prompt: A bank operates a cloud environment dedicated to that organization in its own facilities. Which deployment model is this?
items.explanation: “Private cloud” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: Who owns and operates the physical infrastructure in the Microsoft Azure public cloud?
items.explanation: “Microsoft” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A team stops an unused pay-as-you-go resource to avoid further compute charges. Which cloud concept makes this possible?
items.explanation: “Consumption-based pricing” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A function runs only when a message arrives and the team does not manage its host servers. Which computing model is being used?
items.explanation: “Serverless computing” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A company runs an application on Azure virtual machines. Which TWO tasks are normally the customer’s responsibility?
options: Replacing failed physical disks in the Azure datacenter
items.explanation: “Patching the guest operating system” and “Configuring access to the application” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A cloud application recovers from component failures without losing its service objective. Which benefit does this demonstrate?
items.explanation: “Reliability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A team adds more virtual machines to handle increased demand. Which type of scaling is this?
items.explanation: “Horizontal scaling” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A team increases the CPU and memory assigned to one virtual machine. Which type of scaling is this?
items.explanation: “Vertical scaling” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: Security tools and centrally enforced configuration reduce inconsistent resource settings. Which cloud benefits do these capabilities primarily support?
items.explanation: “Security and governance” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A lift-and-shift migration moves an existing server to an Azure virtual machine with minimal application changes. Which service type is used?
items.explanation: “Infrastructure as a service (IaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: Employees collaborate in Microsoft 365 without managing application servers. Which cloud service type describes Microsoft 365?
items.explanation: “Software as a service (SaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: Which service type normally requires the customer to patch the guest operating system?
items.explanation: “Infrastructure as a service (IaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: Which service type is most appropriate for rapidly building an API with a managed runtime and integrated scaling?
items.explanation: “Platform as a service (PaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A company subscribes to a fully managed payroll application and configures only its users and business settings. Which service type is this?
items.explanation: “Software as a service (SaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A government workload must run in an isolated Azure instance designed for specific sovereignty requirements. Which type of region may be appropriate?
items.explanation: “A sovereign region” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: What is the smallest physical facility described in Azure’s global infrastructure hierarchy?
items.explanation: “A datacenter” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: An administrator moves a virtual machine to another resource group in the same subscription. What happens to the virtual machine’s Azure region?
items.answer: It remains in its existing region
options: It remains in its existing region
It automatically moves to the resource group’s region
It moves to the nearest region pair
items.explanation: “It remains in its existing region” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Which TWO Azure scopes can contain multiple subscriptions beneath them?
answers: A Microsoft Entra tenant through its management-group hierarchy
options: A Microsoft Entra tenant through its management-group hierarchy
items.explanation: “A management group” and “A Microsoft Entra tenant through its management-group hierarchy” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: An application requires complete control over its Windows operating system and installed software. Which compute option is most appropriate?
items.explanation: “An Azure virtual machine” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Several virtual machines must be distributed across fault and update domains in one datacenter. Which construct should be used?
items.explanation: “An availability set” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Resources in one virtual network must be divided into separate IP address ranges. What should be created?
items.explanation: “Subnets” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Which endpoint type allows an Azure service to be reached from the internet, subject to access controls?
items.explanation: “A public endpoint” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: A company wants a managed container platform with Kubernetes orchestration. Which Azure compute service should it evaluate?
items.explanation: “Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Compliance records are rarely retrieved and can tolerate hours of retrieval latency. Which blob access tier is most cost-effective?
items.explanation: “Archive tier” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Managed disks attached to Azure virtual machines use which broad storage category?
items.explanation: “Disk storage” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: An application needs a schemaless key-value store for large amounts of nonrelational structured data. Which service should it use?
items.explanation: “Azure Table Storage” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Which redundancy option keeps three synchronous copies in one physical datacenter?
items.explanation: “Locally redundant storage (LRS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: A company wants to assess and migrate on-premises servers, databases, and applications to Azure. Which service should it use?
items.explanation: “Azure Migrate” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: A user signs in with a fingerprint instead of a password. Which authentication category does this represent?
items.explanation: “Passwordless authentication” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: A team needs to grant read-only access to resources in one resource group. What should it assign?
items.answer: An Azure RBAC role at the resource-group scope
options: An Azure RBAC role at the resource-group scope
items.explanation: “An Azure RBAC role at the resource-group scope” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: In a defense-in-depth strategy, which layer focuses on user identities and access privileges?
items.explanation: “The identity and access layer” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Which principle assumes a breach may already have occurred and designs controls accordingly?
items.explanation: “Assume breach” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Which TWO methods can strengthen authentication beyond a reusable password?
items.explanation: “Multifactor authentication” and “Passwordless authentication” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Management needs cost totals by project, but resources are spread across resource groups. Which metadata helps allocate the costs?
items.explanation: “Consistent project tags” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: Which tool can recommend underutilized resources that may be resized to reduce cost?
items.explanation: “Azure Advisor” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: A team compares pay-as-you-go prices for two architectures before either exists. Which tool should it use?
items.explanation: “Azure Pricing Calculator” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: Which statement about Azure tags is correct?
items.answer: Tags can add business metadata used for organization and cost reporting
options: Tags can add business metadata used for organization and cost reporting
Tags prevent resources from being deleted
items.explanation: “Tags can add business metadata used for organization and cost reporting” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: A resource has both a delete lock and an Azure RBAC Owner assignment for a user. What prevents that user from deleting the resource?
items.explanation: “The delete lock” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: A company wants every new resource to include a required cost-center tag. Which service can enforce or remediate this rule?
items.explanation: “Azure Policy” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: Which statement correctly distinguishes Azure Policy from Azure RBAC?
items.answer: Policy evaluates resource compliance, while RBAC controls permitted user actions
options: Policy evaluates resource compliance, while RBAC controls permitted user actions
Policy resolves DNS, while RBAC selects storage tiers
Policy calculates cost, while RBAC creates budgets
Policy and RBAC perform exactly the same function
items.explanation: “Policy evaluates resource compliance, while RBAC controls permitted user actions” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: Which governance feature inherits through the Azure scope hierarchy when assigned at a management group?
items.explanation: “Azure Policy assignments” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: A template deployment is run twice with no template changes. What is the intended result of declarative infrastructure as code?
items.answer: The environment remains in the declared state
options: The environment remains in the declared state
The subscription is moved to another tenant
items.explanation: “The environment remains in the declared state” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Which Azure feature provides a simplified declarative language that compiles to ARM templates?
items.explanation: “Bicep” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: A developer needs to manage Azure resources from a local terminal using commands such as az group create. Which tool is being used?
items.explanation: “Azure CLI” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Why are ARM template deployments considered repeatable?
items.answer: The desired resource configuration is defined declaratively in a file
options: The desired resource configuration is defined declaratively in a file
The portal records every mouse movement
Availability zones copy the source code
items.explanation: “The desired resource configuration is defined declaratively in a file” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Which TWO interfaces use Azure Resource Manager as the common deployment and management layer?
items.explanation: “The Azure portal” and “Azure CLI” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: A team needs a visual dashboard combining resource metrics and log-query results. Which platform should it use?
items.explanation: “Azure Monitor” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: Which monitoring capability traces application requests across dependencies?
items.explanation: “Application Insights” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: A global Azure incident should be checked before sign-in-specific impact is known. Which public resource gives broad service status?
items.explanation: “Azure status” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: Which Azure Monitor data type records time-stamped numeric values such as CPU percentage?
items.explanation: “Metrics” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.
